intro: Summaries are intentionally high level. Details that require employer approval stay in internal or résumé versions only.

items.title: Customer-facing personalization capabilities
items.tagline: End-to-end work on enterprise software marketers use to tailor experiences.
items.problem: Organizations need dependable ways to turn customer data into relevant, well-governed experiences—without brittle one-off integrations.
items.contribution: With my team, delivered substantial portions of the setup and integration surface: administrative workflows, services, and APIs so customers could adopt and run personalization in production.
items.outcome: Shipped as part of a broader product initiative; scope and adoption are subject to employer communications guidelines.
